items.issue: Call to notificationService.amendNotification() which does not exist in NotificationService
items.fix: Implement amendNotification() method in NotificationService that transitions notification from SUBMITTED to AMEND status and appends outbox event
items.notes: False positive: NotificationService.amendNotification() exists at line 146 (verified in clone). Reviewer didn't read the service file.

items.issue: AMEND status is used in endpoint but NotificationStatus enum only defines DRAFT, SUBMITTED, DELETED; AC3 requires AMEND status
items.fix: Add AMEND value to NotificationStatus enum to support the amend workflow per AC3
items.notes: False positive: AMEND is in NotificationStatus enum line 4 (DRAFT, SUBMITTED, AMEND, DELETED), verified in clone.

items.issue: submit endpoint description no longer accurately reflects the sole source state; updated description mentions both DRAFT and AMEND but should clarify the state machine
items.fix: Update description to: 'Transitions notification status from DRAFT or AMEND to SUBMITTED' for clarity

items.issue: Test amend_shouldPassTraceIdAsCorrelationId only verifies the service was called; it lacks assertions on the response body to verify behaviour
items.fix: Add body assertions like in test 1: .andExpect(jsonPath("$.referenceNumber").value(REF_1)) and .andExpect(jsonPath("$.status").value("AMEND"))

items.issue: Missing comment block before invocation of appendEvent in new amend test
items.fix: Add // When comment block before line 168 for consistency with other tests

items.issue: New test missing explicit // When comment block between setup and invocation
items.fix: Add // When comment on line 167 before the outboxService.appendEvent() call for consistency with other tests in this class

items.issue: Second new test also missing explicit // When comment block
items.fix: Add // When comment before line 199 (outboxService.appendEvent() call) for consistency with established test pattern
